title: Recorded Future - Identity Exposure
content:
This playbook was developed as a template response when an Identity Exposure Playbook Alert has been triggered.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (IdentityRecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, ad-disable-account, ad-expire-password, ad-get-user, okta-add-to-group, okta-search, okta-suspend-user, recordedfuture-identity-playbook-alerts-update.

          transformers:
          - operator: StringifyArray
